pi_items.source: Parsed the downloaded SampleDivesV2.ssrf from the official Subsurface repo, confirming the target Sund Rock trip has date prefix 2010-12.
Parsed the downloaded SampleDivesV2.ssrf, confirming the control Yellow House trip has date prefix 2011-09.
Inspected Subsurface source code (core/units.h), which defines SEAWATER_SALINITY as 10300 (g/10l) and represents Salt water density as 1030 g/l internally/in XML.
Counted the <dive> elements in the official SampleDivesV2.ssrf downloaded from the subsurface github repo. The file actually contains 29 total dives across 4 trips, not 8.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real dive log dataset SampleDivesV2.ssrf from the official Subsurface repository. The dataset contains 29 actual recorded dives, contradicting the task's claim of 8 total dives. The target trip for the modification is correctly identified by the '2010-12' prefix (Sund Rock, WA) and the control trip by '2011-09' (Yellow House, WA). Subsurface correctly maps 'Salt' water type to a salinity value of 1030 g/l (stored internally as 10300 g/10l), which verifies the expected salinity claim.
